TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: ti sa Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan tsug a marivu katua vaɫaw.
S.PHON: ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan ʦug a marivu katua vaʎaw.
S.FORM: ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan cug a marivu katua valjaw.
S.PHON: ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan ʦug a maRivu katua vaʎaw.
S.TRANSL: Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan liked to quarrel with his wife.

S.FORM: nu keman ini pakani, marka veɫatjen.
S.PHON: nu kəman ini pakani, marka vəʎacən.
S.FORM: nu keman ini pakani, marka veljatjen.
S.PHON: nu kəman ini pakani, maRka vəʎaʦən.
S.TRANSL: When they ate he didn’t give her food, but they hit one another(?).

S.FORM: qau limutseng azua vaɫaw; vaik a ɫetaladj tua verung nua tsuqu.
S.PHON: qau ɭimuʦəŋ azua vaʎaw; vaik a ʎətaɭaɉ tua vəruŋ nua ʦuqu.
S.FORM: qau limuceng azua valjaw; vaik a ljetaladj tua verung nua cuqu.
S.PHON: qau ɣimuʦəŋ azua vaʎaw; vaik a ʎətaɣaɉ tua vəRuŋ nua ʦuqu.
S.TRANSL: His wife was angry, and went into a hole in a bischoffia tree.

S.FORM: qau tsuatsuay anga malap ti sa Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan tua putjaw, sa putjavi a tsuqu, a muri paɫekatsauan tua vaɫaw.
S.PHON: qau ʦuaʦuaj aŋa maɭap ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan tua pucaw, sa pucavi a ʦuqu, a muri paʎəkaʦauan tua vaʎaw.
S.FORM: qau cuacuay anga malap ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan tua putjaw, sa putjavi a cuqu, a muri paljekacauan tua valjaw.
S.PHON: qau ʦuaʦuaj aŋa maɣap ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan tua puʦaw, sa puʦavi a ʦuqu, a muRi paʎəkaʦauan tua vaʎaw.
S.TRANSL: After a time Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan took an axe and chopped at the tree to get his wife out.

S.FORM: manu "teng," aya, milayap a sema tjai likuz tua ɫavek.
S.PHON: manu "təŋ," aja, miɭajap a səma cai ɭikuz tua ʎavək.
S.FORM: manu "teng," aya, milayap a sema tjai likuz tua ljavek.
S.PHON: manu "təŋ," aja, miɣajap a səma ʦai ɣikuz tua ʎavək.
S.TRANSL: But it (or she) said “Tung,” and she flew to the far side of the sea.

S.FORM: tsuatsuay anga mapuvarung ti sa Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan.
S.PHON: ʦuaʦuaj aŋa mapuvaruŋ ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan.
S.FORM: cuacuay anga mapuvarung ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan.
S.PHON: ʦuaʦuaj aŋa mapuvaRuŋ ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan.
S.TRANSL: After a time Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan got anxious.

S.FORM: qemaqivu tua sikataqaɫan tu vaik a qemaɫup.
S.PHON: qəmaqivu tua sikataqaʎan tu vaik a qəmaʎup.
S.FORM: qemaqivu tua sikataqaljan tu vaik a qemaljup.
S.PHON: qəmaqivu tua sikataqaʎan tu vaik a qəmaʎup.
S.TRANSL: He called his fellow-villagers to go hunting.

S.FORM: qau kiɫavaran ti sa Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan: "tiaken makamaza ken i dungdung tua ɫavek.
S.PHON: qau kiʎavaran ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan: "tiakən makamaza kən i duŋduŋ tua ʎavək.
S.FORM: qau kiljavaran ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan: "tiaken makamaza ken i dungdung tua ljavek.
S.PHON: qau kiʎavaRan ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan: "tiakən makamaza kən i duŋduŋ tua ʎavək.
S.TRANSL: So Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan said: “I’ll go along here near the sea.

S.FORM: timun pakazua-u itjua pungayan."
S.PHON: timun pakazua-u icua puŋajan."
S.FORM: timun pakazua-u itjua pungayan."
S.PHON: timun pakazua-u iʦua puŋajan."
S.TRANSL: You go along by the cliffs.”

S.FORM: manu neka nu satsemel.
S.PHON: manu nəka nu saʦəməɭ.
S.FORM: manu neka nu sacemel.
S.PHON: manu nəka nu saʦəməɣ.
S.TRANSL: There was no wild game.

S.FORM: nu paluku, qatjuvi marka ngaḍi sakamaya.
S.PHON: nu paɭuku, qacuvi marka ŋaɖi sakamaja.
S.FORM: nu paluku, qatjuvi marka ngadri sakamaya.
S.PHON: nu paɣuku, qaʦuvi maRka ŋaɖi sakamaja.
S.TRANSL: If they started anything, it was just snakes and badgers.

S.FORM: qau kirivu a sikataqaɫan.
S.PHON: qau kirivu a sikataqaʎan.
S.FORM: qau kirivu a sikataqaljan.
S.PHON: qau kiRivu a sikataqaʎan.
S.TRANSL: The villagers complained:

S.FORM: "aku neka nu satsemel?" aya kivadaq tjai sa Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan.
S.PHON: "aku nəka nu saʦəməɭ" aja kivadaq cai sa puʎaʎujaʎujan.
S.FORM: "aku neka nu sacemel?" aya kivadaq tjai sa Puljaljuyaljuyan.
S.PHON: "aku nəka nu saʦəməɣ" aja kivadaq ʦai sa puʎaʎujaʎujan.
S.TRANSL: “Why is there no game?” they asked Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan.

S.FORM: qau kiɫavaran ti sa Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan: "nuka qatjuvi, nuka ngaḍi kuangu," aya kiɫavaran.
S.PHON: qau kiʎavaran ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan: "nuka qacuvi, nuka ŋaɖi kuaŋu," aja kiʎavaran.
S.FORM: qau kiljavaran ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan: "nuka qatjuvi, nuka ngadri kuangu," aya kiljavaran.
S.PHON: qau kiʎavaRan ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan: "nuka qaʦuvi, nuka ŋaɖi kuaŋu," aja kiʎavaRan.
S.TRANSL: He replied: “Shoot even snakes and badgers,” he said.

S.FORM: qau timadju izua i ɫavek a qarawqawqaw sakamaya.
S.PHON: qau timaɉu izua i ʎavək a qarawqawqaw sakamaja.
S.FORM: qau timadju izua i ljavek a qarawqawqaw sakamaya.
S.PHON: qau timaɉu izua i ʎavək a qaRawqawqaw sakamaja.
S.TRANSL: And he was there by the sea shouting away.

S.FORM: qau a sikataqaɫan: "anema kudakudain nazua tsautsau?" aya kinemnem.
S.PHON: qau a sikataqaʎan: "anəma kudakudain nazua ʦauʦau" aja kinəmnəm.
S.FORM: qau a sikataqaljan: "anema kudakudain nazua caucau?" aya kinemnem.
S.PHON: qau a sikataqaʎan: "anəma kudakudain nazua ʦauʦau" aja kinəmnəm.
S.TRANSL: The villagers thought: “What’s this fellow up to?”

S.FORM: qau vaiken a kiqenetj.
S.PHON: qau vaikən a kiqənəc.
S.FORM: qau vaiken a kiqenetj.
S.PHON: qau vaikən a kiqənəʦ.
S.TRANSL: They went to have a look.

S.FORM: mintu "ɫauɫauɫavu a djaraɫap," ayaya semenasenay.
S.PHON: mintu "ʎauʎauʎavu a ɉaraʎap," ajaja səmənasənaj.
S.FORM: mintu "ljauljauljavu a djaraljap," ayaya semenasenay.
S.PHON: mintu "ʎauʎauʎavu a ɉaRaʎap," ajaja səmənasənaj.
S.TRANSL: And he was singing: “Stretch out, banyan tree!”.

S.FORM: qau tsuay anga ɫemauɫau a djaraɫap a sema tjai likuz tua ɫavek.
S.PHON: qau ʦuaj aŋa ʎəmauʎau a ɉaraʎap a səma cai ɭikuz tua ʎavək.
S.FORM: qau cuay anga ljemauljau a djaraljap a sema tjai likuz tua ljavek.
S.PHON: qau ʦuaj aŋa ʎəmauʎau a ɉaRaʎap a səma ʦai ɣikuz tua ʎavək.
S.TRANSL: After a time the tree stretched out to the far side of the sea.

S.FORM: qau azua ti sa Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan semusu a vaik tua djaraɫap.
S.PHON: qau azua ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan səmusu a vaik tua ɉaraʎap.
S.FORM: qau azua ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan semusu a vaik tua djaraljap.
S.PHON: qau azua ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan səmusu a vaik tua ɉaRaʎap.
S.TRANSL: And Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan went along the tree.

S.FORM: mintu tsaluman tua qinaɫivan nua tapaw nua vaɫaw.
S.PHON: mintu ʦaɭuman tua qinaʎivan nua tapaw nua vaʎaw.
S.FORM: mintu caluman tua qinaljivan nua tapaw nua valjaw.
S.PHON: mintu ʦaɣuman tua qinaʎivan nua tapaw nua vaʎaw.
S.TRANSL: He reached the roof of his wife’s house,

S.FORM: qau sualapen a itung, sa vuɫuqan a paɫeteku.
S.PHON: qau suaɭapən a ituŋ, sa vuʎuqan a paʎətəku.
S.FORM: qau sualapen a itung, sa vuljuqan a paljeteku.
S.PHON: qau suaɣapən a ituŋ, sa vuʎuqan a paʎətəku.
S.TRANSL: and took off his clothes and threw them down below.

S.FORM: manu djumaken nua aɫak nua vaɫaw.
S.PHON: manu ɉumakən nua aʎak nua vaʎaw.
S.FORM: manu djumaken nua aljak nua valjaw.
S.PHON: manu ɉumakən nua aʎak nua vaʎaw.
S.TRANSL: His wife’s child found them.

S.FORM: "aku uzaitsu a itung, kina?
S.PHON: "aku uzaiʦu a ituŋ, kina
S.FORM: "aku uzaicu a itung, kina?
S.PHON: "aku uzaiʦu a ituŋ, kina
S.TRANSL: “Why are these clothes here, mother?

S.FORM: matu su inalangan."
S.PHON: matu su inaɭaŋan."
S.FORM: matu su inalangan."
S.PHON: matu su inaɣaŋan."
S.TRANSL: They look like ones made by you.”

S.FORM: "maka inu ti tjama tua ɫavek?"
S.PHON: "maka inu ti cama tua ʎavək"
S.FORM: "maka inu ti tjama tua ljavek?"
S.PHON: "maka inu ti ʦama tua ʎavək"
S.TRANSL: “How did your father get here across the sea?”

S.FORM: qau sualapen ni sa Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan a dangiɫan, sa vuɫuqan uta.
S.PHON: qau suaɭapən ni sa puʎaʎujaʎujan a daŋiʎan, sa vuʎuqan uta.
S.FORM: qau sualapen ni sa Puljaljuyaljuyan a dangiljan, sa vuljuqan uta.
S.PHON: qau suaɣapən ni sa puʎaʎujaʎujan a daŋiʎan, sa vuʎuqan uta.
S.TRANSL: Then Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan took off his apron (loincloth?) and threw that down too.

S.FORM: qau djumaken nua kakeḍian
S.PHON: qau ɉumakən nua kakəɖian
S.FORM: qau djumaken nua kakedrian
S.PHON: qau ɉumakən nua kakəɖian
S.TRANSL: The child found it.

S.FORM: "aku uzaitsu a dangiɫan?
S.PHON: "aku uzaiʦu a daŋiʎan
S.FORM: "aku uzaicu a dangiljan?
S.PHON: "aku uzaiʦu a daŋiʎan
S.TRANSL: “Why is this apron here?

S.FORM: matu su inalangan."
S.PHON: matu su inaɭaŋan."
S.FORM: matu su inalangan."
S.PHON: matu su inaɣaŋan."
S.TRANSL: It looks like one made by you.”

S.FORM: qau ɫetsasaw a kina, sa kiqenetji a pasa qinaɫivan.
S.PHON: qau ʎəʦasaw a kina, sa kiqənəci a pasa qinaʎivan.
S.FORM: qau ljecasaw a kina, sa kiqenetji a pasa qinaljivan.
S.PHON: qau ʎəʦasaw a kina, sa kiqənəʦi a pasa qinaʎivan.
S.TRANSL: The mother went out, and looked up at the roof.

S.FORM: mintu djemelidjeli ti sa Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan i vavaw tua qinaɫivan.
S.PHON: mintu ɉəməɭiɉəɭi ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan i vavaw tua qinaʎivan.
S.FORM: mintu djemelidjeli ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan i vavaw tua qinaljivan.
S.PHON: mintu ɉəməɣiɉəɣi ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan i vavaw tua qinaʎivan.
S.TRANSL: There was Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan laughing on the roof.

S.FORM: qaqivuin anga nua vaɫaw a pasa qumaqan.
S.PHON: qaqivuin aŋa nua vaʎaw a pasa qumaqan.
S.FORM: qaqivuin anga nua valjaw a pasa qumaqan.
S.PHON: qaqivuin aŋa nua vaʎaw a pasa qumaqan.
S.TRANSL: His wife called to him to come indoors.

S.FORM: qau maseleman anga, keman tua kaiven.
S.PHON: qau masəɭəman aŋa, kəman tua kaivən.
S.FORM: qau maseleman anga, keman tua kaiven.
S.PHON: qau masəɣəman aŋa, kəman tua kaivən.
S.TRANSL: After dark they sat down to supper.

S.FORM: manu ini kan ti sa Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan.
S.PHON: manu ini kan ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan.
S.FORM: manu ini kan ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan.
S.PHON: manu ini kan ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan.
S.TRANSL: Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan didn’t eat.

S.FORM: qau kivadaqan nua vaɫaw: "anema su tjenglayan a keman?" ayain.
S.PHON: qau kivadaqan nua vaʎaw: "anəma su cəŋɭajan a kəman" ajain.
S.FORM: qau kivadaqan nua valjaw: "anema su tjenglayan a keman?" ayain.
S.PHON: qau kivadaqan nua vaʎaw: "anəma su ʦəŋɣajan a kəman" ajain.
S.TRANSL: His wife asked him: “What would you like to eat?”

S.FORM: "avan a vaɫetjuk sakamaya a tjenglayan a keman."
S.PHON: "avan a vaʎəcuk sakamaja a cəŋɭajan a kəman."
S.FORM: "avan a valjetjuk sakamaya a tjenglayan a keman."
S.PHON: "avan a vaʎəʦuk sakamaja a ʦəŋɣajan a kəman."
S.TRANSL: “I would just like to eat an orange (or oranges).”

S.FORM: qau siyaya tua vaɫetjuk sa pakani.
S.PHON: qau sijaja tua vaʎəcuk sa pakani.
S.FORM: qau siyaya tua valjetjuk sa pakani.
S.PHON: qau sijaja tua vaʎəʦuk sa pakani.
S.TRANSL: So she picked an orange for him and gave it to him to eat.

S.FORM: qau muri qemereng anga.
S.PHON: qau muri qəmərəŋ aŋa.
S.FORM: qau muri qemereng anga.
S.PHON: qau muRi qəməRəŋ aŋa.
S.TRANSL: When they were going to lie down,

S.FORM: kiɫavaran ti sa Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan: "qemereng aken i kulakula," aya kiɫavaran tua vaɫaw.
S.PHON: kiʎavaran ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan: "qəmərəŋ akən i kuɭakuɭa," aja kiʎavaran tua vaʎaw.
S.FORM: kiljavaran ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan: "qemereng aken i kulakula," aya kiljavaran tua valjaw.
S.PHON: kiʎavaRan ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan: "qəməRəŋ akən i kuɣakuɣa," aja kiʎavaRan tua vaʎaw.
S.TRANSL: Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan said: “I’ll lie at the foot end,” he said to his wife.

S.FORM: a vaɫaw: "maya qemereng i kulakula; makulakula sun."
S.PHON: a vaʎaw: "maja qəmərəŋ i kuɭakuɭa; makuɭakuɭa sun."
S.FORM: a valjaw: "maya qemereng i kulakula; makulakula sun."
S.PHON: a vaʎaw: "maja qəməRəŋ i kuɣakuɣa; makuɣakuɣa sun."
S.TRANSL: His wife said: “Don’t lie at the foot end; you’ll have trouble with the feet.”

S.FORM: "qemereng aken i ɫaving," aya ti sa Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan.
S.PHON: "qəmərəŋ akən i ʎaviŋ," aja ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan.
S.FORM: "qemereng aken i ljaving," aya ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan.
S.PHON: "qəməRəŋ akən i ʎaviŋ," aja ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan.
S.TRANSL: “I’ll lie at the edge,” said Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan.

S.FORM: kiɫavaran a vaɫaw: "maya qemereng i ɫaviɫaving; maɫaviɫaving sun.
S.PHON: kiʎavaran a vaʎaw: "maja qəmərəŋ i ʎaviʎaviŋ; maʎaviʎaviŋ sun.
S.FORM: kiljavaran a valjaw: "maya qemereng i ljaviljaving; maljaviljaving sun.
S.PHON: kiʎavaRan a vaʎaw: "maja qəməRəŋ i ʎaviʎaviŋ; maʎaviʎaviŋ sun.
S.TRANSL: His wife said: “Don’t lie at the side; you’ll have trouble at the edge.

S.FORM: qerengu izua itjua qeluz," aya a vaɫaw.
S.PHON: qərəŋu izua icua qəɭuz," aja a vaʎaw.
S.FORM: qerengu izua itjua qeluz," aya a valjaw.
S.PHON: qəRəŋu izua iʦua qəɣuz," aja a vaʎaw.
S.TRANSL: Lie there by the pillar,” said his wife.

S.FORM: qau vaik a qemereng sema tjua qeluz ti sa Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan.
S.PHON: qau vaik a qəmərəŋ səma cua qəɭuz ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan.
S.FORM: qau vaik a qemereng sema tjua qeluz ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan.
S.PHON: qau vaik a qəməRəŋ səma ʦua qəɣuz ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan.
S.TRANSL: So Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan went to lie by the pillar.

S.FORM: ita vengin inika taqed, qaritjqitjqitj.
S.PHON: ita vəŋin inika taqəd, qaricqicqic.
S.FORM: ita vengin inika taqed, qaritjqitjqitj.
S.PHON: ita vəŋin inika taqəd, qaRiʦqiʦqiʦ.
S.TRANSL: The whole night he didn’t sleep; he was just grinding his teeth.

S.FORM: kivadaqan nua vaɫaw ti sa Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan: "makuda sun?
S.PHON: kivadaqan nua vaʎaw ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan: "makuda sun
S.FORM: kivadaqan nua valjaw ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan: "makuda sun?
S.PHON: kivadaqan nua vaʎaw ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan: "makuda sun
S.TRANSL: His wife asked him: “What’s the matter with you?

S.FORM: aku ini sun a taqed?
S.PHON: aku ini sun a taqəd
S.FORM: aku ini sun a taqed?
S.PHON: aku ini sun a taqəd
S.TRANSL: Why don’t you sleep?

S.FORM: aku qaritjqitjqitj sun?"
S.PHON: aku qaricqicqic sun"
S.FORM: aku qaritjqitjqitj sun?"
S.PHON: aku qaRiʦqiʦqiʦ sun"
S.TRANSL: Why do you grind your teeth?”

S.FORM: "maitazuangata nu keman aken tua vaɫetjuk," aya ti sa Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan.
S.PHON: "maitazuaŋata nu kəman akən tua vaʎəcuk," aja ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan.
S.FORM: "maitazuangata nu keman aken tua valjetjuk," aya ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan.
S.PHON: "maitazuaŋata nu kəman akən tua vaʎəʦuk," aja ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan.
S.TRANSL: “It’s always just like that when I eat oranges,” he said.

S.FORM: manu pentjupetjuq tua qeluz nua tapaw.
S.PHON: manu pəncupəcuq tua qəɭuz nua tapaw.
S.FORM: manu pentjupetjuq tua qeluz nua tapaw.
S.PHON: manu pənʦupəʦuq tua qəɣuz nua tapaw.
S.TRANSL: In fact he was pulling out the pillar of the house.

S.FORM: qau sa pasusu-i tua naɫemauɫaw a djaraɫap a tapaw.
S.PHON: qau sa pasusu-i tua naʎəmauʎaw a ɉaraʎap a tapaw.
S.FORM: qau sa pasusu-i tua naljemauljaw a djaraljap a tapaw.
S.PHON: qau sa pasusu-i tua naʎəmauʎaw a ɉaRaʎap a tapaw.
S.TRANSL: And he caused the whole house to follow the line of the stretched out banyan tree.

S.FORM: qau maɫianga patseged anga tiamadju a mapuɫat.
S.PHON: qau maʎiaŋa paʦəgəd aŋa tiamaɉu a mapuʎat.
S.FORM: qau maljianga paceged anga tiamadju a mapuljat.
S.PHON: qau maʎiaŋa paʦəgəd aŋa tiamaɉu a mapuʎat.
S.TRANSL: Next day they all woke up.

S.FORM: mintu i ɫaviɫaving anga tua ɫavek.
S.PHON: mintu i ʎaviʎaviŋ aŋa tua ʎavək.
S.FORM: mintu i ljaviljaving anga tua ljavek.
S.PHON: mintu i ʎaviʎaviŋ aŋa tua ʎavək.
S.TRANSL: And there they were on the edge of the sea.

S.FORM: qau mingtjus anga azua vaɫaw.
S.PHON: qau miŋcus aŋa azua vaʎaw.
S.FORM: qau mingtjus anga azua valjaw.
S.PHON: qau miŋʦus aŋa azua vaʎaw.
S.TRANSL: His wife was startled.

S.FORM: "aku imazanga ken?" aya kiɫavaran.
S.PHON: "aku imazaŋa kən" aja kiʎavaran.
S.FORM: "aku imazanga ken?" aya kiljavaran.
S.PHON: "aku imazaŋa kən" aja kiʎavaRan.
S.TRANSL: “Why am I here now?” she said.

S.FORM: qau kiɫavaran ti sa Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan: "tiaken a nakematsu a pasa maza.
S.PHON: qau kiʎavaran ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan: "tiakən a nakəmaʦu a pasa maza.
S.FORM: qau kiljavaran ti sa Puljaljuyaljuyan: "tiaken a nakemacu a pasa maza.
S.PHON: qau kiʎavaRan ti sa puʎaʎujaʎujan: "tiakən a nakəmaʦu a pasa maza.
S.TRANSL: Puɫaɫuyaɫuyan said: “It was I who brought you here.

S.FORM: ini anga nakuya aken.
S.PHON: ini aŋa nakuja akən.
S.FORM: ini anga nakuya aken.
S.PHON: ini aŋa nakuja akən.
S.TRANSL: I’m not bad any more.

S.FORM: mayanga mavilad.
S.PHON: majaŋa maviɭad.
S.FORM: mayanga mavilad.
S.PHON: majaŋa maviɣad.
S.TRANSL: Don’t run away.

S.FORM: a pareka nanguanguaqi anga itjen mapuɫat."
S.PHON: a parəka naŋuaŋuaqi aŋa icən mapuʎat."
S.FORM: a pareka nanguanguaqi anga itjen mapuljat."
S.PHON: a paRəka naŋuaŋuaqi aŋa iʦən mapuʎat."
S.TRANSL: Let’s all be good to one another.”
